codeReview.summary: County-aware PA routing is implemented and covered well for VAL-EXPAND-002 (Broward routes to BCPA; Miami-Dade still routes to MD PA). However, VAL-EXPAND-001 is not satisfied: the Broward scraper is configured for only two endpoints and tests were relaxed to >=2 hosts, while the contract requires >=3 distinct Broward city ArcGIS endpoints.

issues.description: Broward COUNTY_CONFIGS defines only 2 endpoints (fort-lauderdale and broward-county-wide). VAL-EXPAND-001 requires scrape_damage_permits("broward") to attempt >=3 distinct Broward city ArcGIS endpoints. The current implementation cannot meet that assertion.

The validation test asserts len(seen_hosts) >= 2, which is weaker than VAL-EXPAND-001's requirement of >=3 distinct Broward city ArcGIS endpoints. This allows the feature to pass tests while still violating the contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Acceptance criteria drift occurred: feature/contract require >=3 Broward city endpoints, but implementation/handoff/tests normalized expectation to >=2 due endpoint availability.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: features.json expectedBehavior includes 'Broward config has >=3 city endpoints'; validation-contract.md lines 438-441 require >=3 distinct hostnames; tests/test_broward_expansion.py:72 asserts only >=2; handoff test descriptions also state >=2.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Broward GIS endpoint discovery knowledge is not captured in shared library, causing repeated ad-hoc endpoint investigation during execution.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for session b5db106e-d3c4-4ed4-abe0-26fca7d9ff4d shows many WebSearch/curl discovery calls for Hollywood/Pembroke Pines/Coral Springs/Pompano/BCPA endpoint viability; .factory/library currently contains only architecture.md, environment.md, and user-testing.md with no county endpoint matrix.

summary: Reviewed broward-expansion against VAL-EXPAND-001/002 using handoff, commit diff, and transcript skeleton. VAL-EXPAND-002 is satisfied by county-aware PA routing, but VAL-EXPAND-001 fails because only two Broward endpoints are implemented and tests were weakened to >=2 instead of the required >=3.
